questionHtml: Suggest a reason that researchers use BCH rather than brain mass to indicate brain size.
markschemeHtml:
easier to measure/doesn’t require dissection/non-invasive / shrew not harmed/killed/more ethical;

The mark can be awarded for one of these reasons even if it is not the first reason given in the answer.

meta.title: Suggest a reason that researchers use BCH rather than brain mass to indicate brain size.
